title: Fix Broken Intro Video on Metrics Analyst Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Metrics Analyst intro video to play when I click on it, so that I can learn how the feature works.
description: The intro video link on the Metrics Analyst page was showing as unavailable when clicked. The video source was replaced with a working YouTube link (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uLJ4QmpoPo8) to restore the onboarding video experience.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking the intro video link opens a playable video
The video loads without showing an 'unavailable' message
The replacement YouTube video is the correct Metrics Analyst overview
ux_changes: Replaced the broken intro video link with a working YouTube URL so users can view the Metrics Analyst onboarding video.
implementation_notes: Simple video URL replacement. Deployed directly to production.
comment_summary: Developer deployed the fix directly to production and confirmed it was ready for review.
